# Elzinga Creative Studio

> Professional photography and videography studio based in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Serving all of West Michigan including Kent County, Ottawa County, and surrounding areas.

## About

Elzinga Creative Studio is a full-service creative agency offering photography, videography, and marketing services throughout Grand Rapids and West Michigan. Founded by Kaden Elzinga, the studio delivers high-quality visual content for individuals, families, real estate professionals, athletes, and businesses of all sizes.

## Services

- **Real Estate Photography**: Professional interior and exterior shoots for realtors and property listings across Grand Rapids and West Michigan. Fast turnaround, MLS-ready images.
- **Senior Photography**: Milestone senior portraits with a creative, editorial approach.
- **Sports Photography**: Action and portrait photography for athletes and teams.
- **Wedding Photography**: Full wedding day coverage with a natural, documentary style.
- **Family Photography**: Lifestyle and portrait sessions for families.
- **Brand Photography**: Commercial and brand-building shoots for businesses. Past clients include Biggby Coffee.
- **Event Photography**: Coverage for corporate events, launches, and private gatherings.
- **Social Media Content**: Photography and videography optimized for brand social channels.
- **Videography**: Creative video production for businesses and personal projects.

## Service Area

Grand Rapids, MI | Wyoming, MI | Kentwood, MI | Walker, MI | Grandville, MI | Byron Center, MI | Rockford, MI | Lowell, MI | Ada, MI | Caledonia, MI | Holland, MI | Zeeland, MI | Hudsonville, MI | Jenison, MI | West Michigan | Kent County, MI | Ottawa County, MI

## Notable Clients

- Biggby Coffee (commercial brand photography)
- Mars Hill Church
- Grand Rapids Griffins
- Pop Kitchen LLC

## Contact

- Website: https://elzingacreativestudio.com
- Email: kaden@elzingacreativestudio.com
- Location: Grand Rapids, Michigan

## Why Choose Elzinga Creative Studio

Whether you need real estate photos that sell listings faster, senior portraits that capture a milestone, brand imagery that builds credibility, or wedding photos you'll keep forever — Elzinga Creative Studio brings a sharp eye and professional execution to every shoot. Locally owned and operated in Grand Rapids, serving all of West Michigan.
